subcodes.first_line: The Divine Book is occupied, at eventide and at dawn, with the mention of the friends. Today the people of Bahá and the companions of the Ark must [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الهی در عشی و اشراق بذکر دوستان مشغول امروز باید اهل بها و اصحاب سفینه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
